_comment: FHWA-HRT-05-083 Appendix F Table 15 published stay 18S: m=52.87 kg/m, T=2.730e+06 N, L=112.28 m, omega=6.36 rad/s, f=1.012 Hz. Endpoint geometry is an assumed 30 deg planar chord because Table 15 does not publish coordinates. EA and diameter are inferred from mass using rho_steel=7850 kg/m^3 and E=200 GPa.
name: 18S

assumptions.geometry: planar 30 degree chord; not published in Table 15
assumptions.EA: E=200 GPa times steel-equivalent area mass/rho_steel
assumptions.diameter: steel-equivalent diameter from mass/rho_steel; aerodynamic diameter not published here
